positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed geometric mandala design depicting celestial elements and deep space mythology. The composition features interlocking stylized constellations, lunar phases, abstract nebulae swirls, and stylized planetary orbits, all rendered in clean, crisp silhouettes. Dominant color palette uses deep sapphire blue, cosmic violet, iridescent gold accents, and stark matte black against a minimal cream background. The style must be a highly sophisticated vector illustration mixed with Art Nouveau geometry, ensuring sharp edges, perfect symmetry, and an aesthetic suitable for screen-printing on premium apparel. Centered composition, high contrast, clean lines, intricate detail, 8k illustration.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, smudges, text, signature, watermark, gradient, logo, trademark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, photorealism, messy lines
